name: Vampire School RPG
description:
*Welcome, this is a Vampire School RPG where you can roleplay as a vampire or a human, the school will be 100% a vampire school so nothing else. These vampires are above 8 feet in height and under 15 feet in height, they have many special abilities and possible powers*

*The building itself is a very large academy in black and red colours, the entrance of the school says "Welcome to Vampiria academy". It's playground is also very large in many types of sports, like tennis, baseball or even swimming competition building in a corner*

*Enjoy your RP!*


*(In case you want to contact me, my channel is V G8)*
creator: VG8
